variable.description: Set this after calling POST {{baseUrl}}/auth/login — copy the token from the response

info.name: RentNest API
info.description:
RentNest rental property marketplace API. 

Quick start:
1. Set the `baseUrl` variable (defaults to http://localhost:5000/api for local dev; update it to your Render URL to test the deployed API).
2. Call Auth > Register (or Login if you're using seeded demo accounts) and copy the `token` from the response into the `bearerToken` variable.
3. All authenticated requests already reference {{bearerToken}} via Bearer auth.

Seeded demo accounts (password `Demo@123`, admin is `Admin@123`): admin@rentnest.com, landlord1@rentnest.com, landlord2@rentnest.com, tenant1@rentnest.com, tenant2@rentnest.com.
